title: Founder Associate
requirements_met: Work directly with founder on high-impact strategic initiatives: founder-facing generalist background
Entrepreneurial mindset, thrive in ambiguous fast-moving situations: ex-Minima founder-facing generalist
Identify opportunities to expand TAM / new product verticals: strategy + ops generalist
gaps: Demonstrated excellence in analytical and financial modelling - not Ryan's core strength
Fluency in a continental European language required - likely a hard gap
M&A due diligence experience not in profile
preferred_met: Passion for fintech / consumer money mission

experience_fit.calculation: Mid-level generalist fits FA scope; financial-modelling lean reduces slightly

industry_match.calculation: Fintech using AI automation - good AI alignment

location_match.calculation: London hybrid (2 days/week), Ryan covers London

notes: Plum: AI-powered saving/investing app, 2M+ users across 10 European markets, GBP 2bn saved. FA on leadership team focused on TAM expansion, new geographies, acquisitions. European language requirement is the key gap.

must_haves.req: Proven track record in investment banking or corporate finance, ideally within financial services
must_haves.note: Ryan has fundraising-support exposure but no IB/corporate-finance role

must_haves.req: Demonstrated excellence in analytical and financial modelling
must_haves.note: Not a core skill; no formal financial-modeling track record

must_haves.req: Fluency in a continental European language in addition to English
must_haves.note: No EU language listed on CV

must_haves.req: Lead due diligence on acquisitions / build financial models & business cases
must_haves.note: Investor-facing fundraising support, but no M&A diligence or modeling

interview_match.one_line_verdict: Three independent hard gates (IB/corp-finance, financial modeling, EU language) each screen Ryan out — this is a finance-analyst FA, not a generalist FA.
